epoch_evaluations_payload_check.name: epoch_evaluations_payload_check
epoch_evaluations_payload_check.value: "epoch_evaluations"."payload_json" IS NOT NULL OR "epoch_evaluations"."payload_ref" IS NOT NULL

tenant_isolation.name: tenant_isolation
tenant_isolation.using:
EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM charge_receipts cr
        JOIN billing_accounts ba ON ba.id = cr.billing_account_id
        WHERE cr.id = "llm_charge_details"."charge_receipt_id"
          AND ba.owner_user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
      )
